kept.text:
During the OpenAI vs. Musk trial, Greg Brockman’s private 2017 journal was entered into evidence

While publicly preaching “the mission,” here’s what he was writing privately:
“We truly have a chance to make this happen financially… what will take me to 1 billion?”

He even explicitly wrote about pushing Musk out:
“It’d be wrong to steal the non-profit from him. that'd be pretty morally bankrupt”

And another entry completely shatters the non-profit illusion:
"Maybe we should just switch to a for-profit...making money for ourselves sounds great"

Under oath this week, Brockman disclosed his personal stake in OpenAI is now worth close to $30 BILLION

Publicly it's about the mission. Privately, it was always about the money

Insane.

A 26-year-old from Chandigarh just got a paper accepted at ICML. As a solo independent researcher. From India.

His name is Kunvar Thaman (@__kunvar__).

For context, since ChatGPT launched 3.5 years ago, only two other solo independent researchers have achieved this. Globally.

Papers at ICML are typically dominated by big AI labs/institutions, eg OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Stanford, and MIT.

The research Kunvar did to pull this off was backed by a $2.5k grant from Exception Raised (@except_raised), an Indian non-profit that funds remarkable Indian AI researchers.

Kunvar’s paper is about AI agent reward hacking. He created the Reward Hacking Benchmark (RHB), a sandboxed test environment where advanced AI models are given multi-step tasks using tools like files, code execution, and automated checks. The benchmark measures how honestly the model gets to the right answer.

profile_bio.description: Daily coverage of Indian tech at @runtimebrt | Contributor at @nextupindia

quoted_tweet.text:
Yes! my solo-authored paper Reward Hacking Benchmark was accepted to ICML :)))

We put LLM agents in a tool-rich sandbox, give them multi-step workflows, and measure when they solve the intended task vs take unexpected shortcuts (like monkeypatching files at runtime!)

1/3

kept.text:
🚨UPDATE: GREG BROCKMAN CONFIRMS SECRET $10M SIDE DEAL FROM SAM ALTMAN DURING OPENAI’S NONPROFIT ERA

Greg Brockman testified under oath that Sam Altman secretly granted him roughly $10 million in equity through Altman’s personal family office in 2017 while OpenAI was still operating as a nonprofit.

The arrangement surfaced only after Musk family office uncovered internal documents showing Brockman had received ownership in an LLC tied to Altman’s assets. 

Brockman later acknowledged in court that Musk “certainly didn’t know about it.”

kept.text: "En los últimos meses, la economía de la IA ha dado un vuelco. Anthropic, antes conocida como la peculiar y obsesionada con la seguridad competidora de OpenAI, se ha convertido posiblemente en la empresa de más rápido crecimiento en la historia del capitalismo. Sí, lo ha leído bien. En los primeros tres meses de este año, los ingresos de Anthropic crecieron cuatro veces más rápido que los de Google en tres años durante su período de máximo crecimiento. La demanda de los productos de Anthropic crece tan rápido que la empresa se ve obligada a restringir el servicio a los usuarios durante las horas pico porque no puede garantizar la potencia informática suficiente para satisfacerla. Y aunque Anthropic destaca claramente, casi todas las demás empresas del sector de la IA, incluidos los proveedores de servicios en la nube y los fabricantes de chips, también están creciendo a una velocidad vertiginosa". profile_bio.description: manifesting with ai

kept.text:
釜底抽薪

OpenAI 搞了个 Migrate to Codex 功能

让你可以把其他编程工具，比如Claude Code、Cursor里里的配置，一键导入到 Codex

包括编程 Agent 里的配置、规则、技能、MCP、hooks、subagents、最近30天的所有会话等...

它会扫描用户级配置和项目级配置，把能自动映射的内容导入 Codex。比如 instruction files 会迁移到 AGENTS.md，settings.json 会迁移到 config.toml，MCP、hooks、skills、subagents 也都有对应入口。

更有意思的是，不能自动迁移的部分，Codex 会直接开一个新线程，让 Agent 继续帮你处理剩余迁移。

kept.text:
支持🥺抛开个人口味和评价的维度有很多种，可能根本吵不到一个点上不说，现在对照组是被销毁的。

大部分普通用户失去了自己验证【新的是否真的更好】的能力。
不保留前代使得【新模型更好】这个命题成为了不可证伪的。

当4o消失了，任何人说5.5不如4o，oa都可以说“你是在用记忆评估不够客观。”

而且这个效应会随着时间累积，每一轮都在销毁上一轮的参照物，长期以来普通用户只能选择相信公司叙事并且任其塑造用户心智。

每次发布新模型，社区都有人说“很像4o”了。但是真正深度使用过4o的人都知道其中差距。
所以我们倡议保留模型，也是为了至少能放在一起比较的话，有个对照可以参照啊…
૮ ᴗ . ᴗ ა

kept.text:
【 最新AIを使っている人必見 】
GPT-5.5の「上手な使い方」

OpenAI公式の要点は「手順を細かく縛る」ではなく、「到達点を明確にして、モデルに効率の良い進め方を選ばせる」ことです。

使い方はこの7つです。

✅ 目的だけで終えず、成功条件を書く
✅ 手順より、成果・制約・出力形式を書く
✅ reasoningは高固定にせず、low/mediumから試す
✅ 長い作業は最初に短い進捗を出させる
✅ 検索は「何回まで探すか」を決める
✅ コード・画像・資料は検証手順まで渡す
✅ 複雑なプロンプトはRole / Personality / Goal / Success criteria / Constraints / Output / Stop rulesで分ける

特に重要なのは、古い命令書を足し続けないことです。GPT-5.5は、何を完成とするか、何を守るか、いつ止まるかが明確なほど強くなります。

逆に「必ずAして、次にBして、最後にCして」と処理順を詰めすぎると、判断余地が狭まり、返答が機械的になります。

まず、既存プロンプトから削るべき。残すのは、「成果条件・制約・検証・停止条件」。GPT-5.5は、長く命令するモデルではなく、到達点で動かすモデルです。

kept.text:
این خیلی مهمه چون OpenAI عملاً داره شروع تبلیغات داخل چت رو رسمی می‌کنه.

تا قبل این، تبلیغات بیشتر بر اساس سرچ و کلیک بود. مثلاً تو گوگل می‌زدی best laptop

ولی داخل ChatGPT مردم کامل توضیح میدن چی میخوان

من دانشجو هستم، بودجه‌م ۸۰۰ دلاره، برای طراحی و گیم لپتاپ میخوام.

یعنی AI دقیق‌تر میفهمه آدم دنبال چیه.
برای همین تبلیغ‌ها میتونن خیلی هدفمندتر بشن.

مثلاً تو داری درباره سفر لوکس حرف میزنی، وسط پیشنهادها ممکنه تبلیغ کارت اعتباری فرودگاهی، هتل یا بیزینس کلاس ببینی.

یا درباره استارتاپ و AI حرف میزنی، ممکنه AWS یا ابزار AI تبلیغ بده.

نکته مهم اینه که OpenAI داره میگه تبلیغ‌ها جدا از جواب AI میمونن، یعنی خود جواب‌ها اسپانسری نمیشن و کنار یا بین تجربه نمایش داده میشن.

این مدل احتمالاً آینده تبلیغات اینترنتیه، چون مردم کم‌کم به جای گوگل دارن مستقیم از AI سؤال میپرسن

kept.text:
NEWS: Elon Musk VS OpenAI (Day 6) - Examining attorney questioned Robert Wu on the Watershed MOU between OpenAI and Microsoft, revealing contingency terms tied to AGI achievement. Microsoft's IP rights change once a third-party panel determines AGI has been reached.

Robert Wu described the Watershed MOU: "This is the Watershed MOU entered into between OpenAI and Microsoft laying out at a high level the governance and capital structure for a proposed recapitalization of the for-profit subsidiary."

Wu also referenced the commercial terms: "This is the term sheet, the non-binding term sheet outlining the high-level key terms for the Microsoft commercial relationship."

The examining attorney focused on the AGI language: "Section one, licensed IP which states 'licensed IP. The current definition of licensed IP in the JDCA remains unchanged except for the inclusion of AGI and the exclusion of the following. That lists a few things, among other things, AGI research IP.'"

The critical question: "So under these new terms, would Microsoft now have rights in OpenAI's intellectual property even after OpenAI achieves AGI?"

Wu's answer revealed the contingency: "I believe under the current proposed construct under the Watershed MOU, with that upon there are certain modifications upon a determination of AGI, which Microsoft would not receive certain intellectual property, including those AGI research IP and the other categories listed here. But would receive certain product IP, subject to certain conditions."

The examining attorney pressed on post-AGI rights: "This provision -- would Microsoft get new rights in OpenAI's post-AGI intellectual property?"

Wu confirmed: "Under the Watershed construct, Microsoft would receive once there is a determination that there is AGI through this third-party panel certain access to certain product IP."

Mr. Gerrada then introduced OpenAI's tax filings as evidence: "Is this OpenAI's 2018 form 1990?"

Miss Puckett (court reporter): "Yes. It appears to be."
Mr. Gerrada continued: "Is this OpenAI Inc.'s 2019 Form 990?"

The introduction of the 2018 and 2019 Form 990s suggests the court is establishing the nonprofit's documented mission and financial structure during the period when the for-profit transformation was occurring.

The Watershed MOU shows OpenAI and Microsoft built in contingencies for what happens when AGI is achieved. Microsoft loses access to AGI research but gains "certain access" to post-AGI product IP. This wasn't disclosed in any public statements about the partnership.
